description:
Fix Tutorial Walkthrough Persistence

Ensure the tutorial walkthrough respects user preferences and connects skip action to backend to prevent repeated display.

Requirements:
- Connect tutorial skip action to backend API endpoint
- Persist user's "skip" or "dismiss" action in the database
- Verify tutorial does not display again after user skips it
- Handle API failure gracefully (show tutorial again only if persistence failed)
- Check tutorial visibility status on application load/login
- Consider user session state - ensure preference persists across devices
- Add appropriate error handling and logging for backend communication
- Test scenarios: skip tutorial, logout, login on same device and different device

Edge Cases:
- User skips tutorial but backend request fails (retry or local storage fallback)
- User clears browser data (should still respect backend preference)
- New tutorial versions (may need versioning to show updated tutorials)
title: Persist tutorial skip action across devices with backend sync
